attributes.conditionName: Check location calendar that triggered workflow

templates.name: Opportunity: NPN Stage: Booked Status: Open

attributes.body:
https://book.menswellnesscenters.com/watch?name={{contact.first_name}}&loc=richmond


Hi {{contact.first_name}}, your appointment with Men's Wellness Centers Richmond is confirmed.

Your visit: {{appointment.start_time}} at 4050 Innslake Dr, Suite 360 Glen Allen, VA 23060. You'll sit down in person with a provider who's focused on you.

Get the most out of your time by taking 3 minutes to complete your intake form.

https://go.menswellnesscenters.com/medical-intake

Questions? Call or text 866-344-4955.

Send Email Reminder for Today's Appointment, send Intake Form

attributes.body:
Hi {{contact.first_name}}, your Men's Wellness Centers visit is today at {{appointment.only_start_time}}, 996 First Colonial Road Virginia Beach, VA 23454.

Take 3 minutes now so your provider can focus on you, not paperwork:

https://go.menswellnesscenters.com/medical-intake

See you soon. Need anything? Call or text 866-344-4955.

{{contact.first_name}},  Your appointment is today at {{appointment.only_start_time}} at 996 First Colonial Road Virginia Beach, VA 23454. 

Intake form not complete? Complete it at bookmwc.com/intake : {{trigger_link.uj0huJZhOS6LNRaXhcDH}}.  Questions? Call or text 866-344-4955
